common.underDevelopmentMessage: This feature is currently under development. Please check back later.
common.poolNotFoundAfterSync: The pool could not be found. It may not have been created yet or the transaction may have failed.
common.notImplemented: This feature is not yet implemented.

swap.title: Swap
swap.highPriceImpactWarning: High price impact. Proceed despite the potential loss?
swap.slippageDescription: Set the maximum price change you are willing to accept. If the price moves more than this, your trade will revert.
swap.slippageWarningHigh: High slippage may result in unfavorable trades
swap.slippageWarningLow: Low slippage may increase transaction failure probability
swap.swapRouteTooltip: The most efficient path for your swap. Each step may incur liquidity pool fees.
swap.estTotalFeeTooltip: Total estimated swap fees across all routes
swap.avgFeeRateTooltip: The percentage of the total fee relative to your swap amount.
swap.priceImpactTooltip: The difference between market price and estimated price due to trade size.
swap.noQuoteError: Unable to get quote. There may be no pool for this token pair.
swap.insufficientLiquidity: Insufficient pool liquidity. Please enter a smaller amount.
swap.insufficientLiquidityWithReserve: Insufficient pool liquidity. The pool has {reserve} {symbol} available. Please enter a smaller amount.
swap.waitingForApproval: Waiting for approval in your wallet
swap.assetsBeingTransformed: Your valuable assets are being transformed into GIWA
swap.safelySwapped: Safely swapped with GIWATER's solid tech
swap.viewRewardPoints: Go and view your reward points right away!
swap.transactionFailedRetry: The transaction failed. Please try again!

earn.bannerTitle: Turn Swaps into Investments Only on GIWATER
earn.bannerDescription: Experience the next generation of precision liquidity management with automated vaults and instant yield optimization.
earn.simpleEarnDescription: Direct single-asset exposure with maximized yields.
earn.aggregatedNote: *The balance in this module is aggregated across all networks.
earn.informationText: Locking is instant. Unlocking back to the underlying asset requires a 7 days cooldown and is only supported on Giwa Chain.

liquidity.title: Liquidity
liquidity.withdrawDescription:
Please set the amount you wish to withdraw from the active pool
You can easily select the withdrawal percentage using the slider
liquidity.withdrawConfirmTitle: Please review your final withdrawal details
liquidity.withdrawConfirmDescription:
Please verify that the withdrawal amount below is correct
Clicking the [Confirm] button will stop liquidity provision in the pool
and transfer the assets to your connected wallet
liquidity.withdrawSuccessDescription:
Your assets have been safely transferred to your wallet
If they don't appear immediately,
please wait a moment for network synchronization
liquidity.assetsSuccessfullyReturnedBody:
Explore other pools
and find new opportunities to earn rewards again!
liquidity.initialLiquidityDescription: This pool has no liquidity yet. Enter amounts for both tokens to set the initial price ratio.
liquidity.initialPriceWarning: This ratio will determine the initial pool price. It's recommended to set it similar to market price.

vote.title: Lock & Vote
vote.lockMore: Lock more, Earn more: Secure your higher rewards now!
vote.trackActivePositions: Track your active lock positions and rewards directly from the dashboard
vote.bannerTitle: Turn Swaps into Investments Only on
vote.bannerDescription: Swap assets and earn TER tokens automatically. Build your voting power for future rewards
vote.pickLockPosition: Pick a lock position to cast your vote
vote.higherPowerHigherRewards: Higher voting power leads to higher rewards
vote.needMorePower: Need more power? Merge your locks in Dashboard → Locks
vote.toParticipateCheck: See the information below to enable your voting power
vote.step1Description:
Accumulate Points through Swap,
or by providing Liquidity and Staking
vote.step2Description: Lock your Points to receive voting power
vote.alreadyHaveProceed: Already have Points?  Proceed to Lock now!
vote.enterPercentage: Enter the percentage or amount of power you want to assign to this pool.
vote.splitPower: You can split your total power across multiple pools
vote.currentPoolVote: This pool already has {percentage}% allocated. Voting again will update it.
vote.noRemainingAllocation: All voting power for this lock has been allocated to other pools. Reset votes to reallocate.
vote.dragOrEnterToAdjust: Drag or enter to adjust voting weight
vote.readyToEarn: Ready to earn more? Simply lock your tokens to start collecting rewards
vote.cannotUnlockEarly: While you cannot unlock early, you can always add more tokens
vote.extendDuration: or extend your duration to boost your earnings
vote.lockNotice: Notice: Assets cannot be withdrawn until the lock period expires. Please double-check your duration
vote.approveTitle: Approve Point usage before finalizing your lock-up
vote.approveDescription1: To ensure a secure lock-up, you must first approve the use of Point in your wallet
vote.approveDescription2: Once the approval is complete in your wallet popup, you will proceed to the final lock-up step
vote.finalReviewDescription: Token approval successful! Now, click the final confirmation button to complete your lock-up. Your voting power will be activated immediately once this step is finished
vote.lockCreatedDescription1: You have successfully locked your tokens and earned governance voting power
vote.lockCreatedDescription2: Your rewards are now accumulating in real-time—maximize your returns by participating in votes!
vote.checkWalletForApproval: Check your wallet for the approval request
vote.votingCompleteDescription1: Your participation strengthens the GIWATER ecosystem.
vote.votingCompleteDescription2: Your voting power has been allocated to the selected pools, and rewards will be distributed sequentially based on the voting period
vote.votingCompleteSubtitle: Your valuable participation will soon turn into rewards
vote.lockWarningMessage: Do you agree that locked points will be unlocked at TGE and can be converted into TER tokens based on the applicable exchange ratio?
vote.understandRisks: I understand the risks and take full responsibility

voteIncentive.inputTitle: Register additional incentives to boost the pool's voting rate
voteIncentive.inputDescription1: Add incentive tokens to encourage more users to vote for your selected pool — deposited assets will be converted into voting incentives.
voteIncentive.inputDescription2: Please decide carefully, as registered assets cannot be recovered once submitted.
voteIncentive.consentBody: I acknowledge and agree that added incentives are non-refundable and cannot be recovered under any circumstances
voteIncentive.tokenNotWhitelisted: This token is not whitelisted and cannot be used as an incentive.
voteIncentive.bannerLine1: Your incentives have been successfully added to the pool.
voteIncentive.bannerLine2: They will be distributed to voters during this epoch
voteIncentive.approveTitle: Review the incentive amount for your selected pool
voteIncentive.approveDescription2: Once submitted, assets are converted into incentives and are non-recoverable.
voteIncentive.confirmTitle: This is the final step for your incentive registration
voteIncentive.confirmDescription2: Now, please approve the final transaction in your wallet to add the incentives to your selected pool. Once this step is complete, it cannot be canceled or recovered.
voteIncentive.completeDescription: Your assets have been successfully converted into incentive rewards
voteIncentive.poolNotFoundBody: We couldn't find the pool you're trying to incentivize. Please return to the vote list and try again.

pool.feesLifetimeUsdHint: All-time USD is updated per indexed swap in the broker when the fee token has a USD price at that moment. OHLCV bucket jobs do not write this field. If swaps ran but fee-token USD was missing, lifetime stays empty while 24h can still show an estimate from volume × fee bps. UTC midnight resets the 24h counter.
pool.noFilterResults: No pools match the selected filter.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.welcome: Welcome to GiwaSwap Dashboard. Monitor your token balances and manage your assets on the GIWA Sepolia testnet.
dashboard.testTokensDescription: Click the mint button next to each token to mint 10,000 test tokens.
dashboard.mintTestTokensInfo: Click the mint button next to each token to mint 10,000 test tokens.

tokenBalances.title: Token Balances
tokenBalances.connectWalletPrompt: Connect wallet to view token balances
tokenBalances.mintConfirmMessage: Do you want to mint {amount} {symbol} tokens?
tokenBalances.addToWalletFailed: Could not add token to wallet
tokenBalances.addToWalletNoProvider: No browser wallet found. Install MetaMask or use an injected wallet.
tokenBalances.addToWalletNoAccount: Unlock your wallet and select an account, then try again.

heroBanner.title: Turn Swaps into Investments Only on
heroBanner.description: Swap assets and earn TER tokens automatically. Build your voting power for future rewards

approval.approvalDescription: The following tokens need to be approved before adding liquidity.
approval.metamaskNote: Please confirm each token approval in MetaMask. Once all approvals are complete, you can add liquidity.

errors.rateLimitError: RPC rate limit reached. Please try again later
errors.slippageError: Swap failed due to slippage. Try increasing your slippage tolerance.
errors.revertPS: Price slippage exceeded. Try increasing slippage tolerance or adjusting amounts
errors.revertTD: Transaction deadline expired. Please try again
errors.revertAM: Insufficient liquidity amount. Please increase token amounts
errors.revertM0: Token0 transfer failed. Please check approval and balance
errors.revertM1: Token1 transfer failed. Please check approval and balance
errors.revertNP: Invalid pool callback. The pool address may be incorrect
errors.revertLO: Liquidity exceeds maximum per tick. Try a wider range or smaller amount
errors.revertTLU: Invalid tick range: lower tick must be less than upper tick
errors.revertTLM: Tick lower is below minimum allowed tick
errors.revertTUM: Tick upper exceeds maximum allowed tick
errors.revertLOK: Pool is currently locked. Please try again
errors.networkError: Network error occurred. Please check connection

portfolio.claimPointsDescription: Claim your accumulated points to record them on-chain.
portfolio.pokeEnabled: Refresh voting power and this lock's current-epoch votes
portfolio.pokeDisabledNoVote: Only locks that have voted in the current epoch can be poked
portfolio.claimRewardsDescription: Review and claim your accumulated voting rewards.
portfolio.noClaimableRewards: No claimable rewards at this time.
portfolio.increaseLockDescription:
Need more voting power? Add more assets to your current lock.
Easily boost your voting weight and maximize rewards with no complex steps.
portfolio.increaseLockNotice:
Want to boost your voting power?
You can increase the lock amount or extend the locked time. There is no limit on how much you can lock
portfolio.reviewIncreaseAmountTitle: Please review the additional lock amount
portfolio.reviewIncreaseAmountDescription:
Clicking 'Approve' will start the final verification in your connected wallet.
Check your wallet's approval screen to ensure your assets are deposited safely.
portfolio.approveToSign: Approve to sign securely in your connected wallet
portfolio.readyToIncreaseTitle: Everything is ready to increase your lock amount
portfolio.readyToIncreaseDescription: You will see an immediate increase in your voting power upon successful completion.
portfolio.finalStepBoost: Final step to boosting your lock amount
portfolio.additionCompleteTitle: The addition to your lock amount is complete
portfolio.additionCompleteDescription:
Your voting power (vePoint) has been adjusted according to your new balance
Thank you for your continued support of GIWATER.
We're excited to build a better future with you.
portfolio.mergeLocksDescription:
Consolidate multiple locks into one for easier management.
Combine scattered Voting Power (vePoint) and maximize your lock period to earn greater voting weight and rewards.
portfolio.selectLocksToMergeHint: Please select all the lock inventories you wish to merge.
portfolio.noLocksAvailableToMerge: No additional locks available to merge.
portfolio.needTwoLocksForMerge: You need at least two active locks to use the merge feature.
portfolio.mergeWarningMessage: Merging multiple inventories keeps the longest lock-up period and merges all amounts to increase your final voting power. This process will reset any unclaimed rewards. Please ensure you have claimed all available rewards before proceeding.
portfolio.confirmMergeTitle: Review the final details for your merged lock
portfolio.confirmMergeDescription:
Consolidate multiple locks into one for easier management.
Combine scattered Voting Power (vePoint) and maximize your lock period to earn greater voting weight and rewards.
portfolio.powerUpYourVotingInfluence: All locks have been restructured with optimal conditions
portfolio.powerUpYourVotingInfluenceDescription: Collect rewards more efficiently with a single, powerful position.
portfolio.mergeSuccessDescription:
You can now check the consolidated amount and voting power.
View the details under the My Portfolio → Lock tab.
portfolio.mergeProcessedSuccessfullyDescription:
Your locks are now combined into one.
Use your enhanced voting power to shape the future of the ecosystem.
portfolio.extendLocksDescription:
Extend your current expiry date to reactivate your voting power.
Your recalculated voting power will be reflected immediately after wallet approval.
portfolio.extendManualNotice:
The longer the lockup period, the more voting power you can earn.
Once extended, the period cannot be reversed, so please choose carefully.
portfolio.extendAutoMaxNotice:
With Auto Max-Lock enabled, your voting power remains constant and will not decay over time.
Once extended, the period cannot be reversed, so please choose carefully.
portfolio.confirmExtendTitle: Please confirm your selected lockup duration
portfolio.confirmExtendDescription:
Clicking the confirm button below will initiate the final approval in your wallet.
Your voting power (vePoint) will be boosted immediately as the duration increases.
portfolio.extendSignPrompt:
Click 'Confirm' to securely sign the transaction
in your connected wallet
portfolio.extendSuccessTitle: Lockup extension has been successfully completed
portfolio.extendSuccessDescription:
You can now exercise even greater voting power, proportional to your extended duration.
Check your updated lockup details and voting power on the my portfolio right now.
portfolio.extendConfirmedBanner: Your new lockup period has been confirmed
portfolio.disableAutoMaxDescription:
Disabling Auto Max Lock starts the countdown to expiration,
and your voting power will gradually decrease.
Please note that asset withdrawal will only be available after the final lockup maturity date.
portfolio.disableAutoMaxQuestion: Disable Auto Max Lock for this lockup?
portfolio.disableAutoMaxBody1: Disabling it stops the 4-year fixed period, and the {dDay} countdown starts today.
portfolio.disableAutoMaxBody2: Your voting power (vePoint) and reward eligibility will gradually decrease as the remaining time diminishes.
portfolio.disableAutoMaxSignPrompt:
Clicking 'Disable' will initiate a secure signing process
in your connected wallet
portfolio.disableAutoMaxSuccessTitle: Auto Max Lock has been successfully disabled
portfolio.disableAutoMaxSuccessDescription:
The expiration countdown is active, and your voting influence will diminish over time.
Please visit the dashboard to view your new lockup status and withdrawal date.
portfolio.disableAutoMaxSuccessBanner: Auto Max Lock is now securely disabled

stake.title: Set Staking Amount
stake.description:
Select the amount of assets to register in the reward pool.
You will earn TER points in proportion to your staked balance. Any unstaked balance remains eligible for Swap Fee rewards, just as before
stake.dragToAdjust: Drag to adjust your staking percentage
stake.guideWhenStaked: When Staked: Instead of swap fees, you can intensively accumulate 100% Point rewards.
stake.guideWithoutStaking: Without Staking: No Point rewards will be generated, and you will only receive 90% of the incurred swap fees.
stake.guideCallToAction: Stake now to accumulate higher-value Points and secure your governance power!
stake.reviewMessage:
Would you like to proceed with staking as configured?
Clicking the [Confirm] button will direct you to the wallet approval step
stake.waitingWalletMessage:
Wallet approval is required to proceed with staking
Please check the popup in your connected wallet
stake.executionMessage:
Asset access has been approved in your connected wallet
Click the [Confirm] button to execute staking
stake.successMessage:
Your selected assets have been
safely staked in the reward pool
You will now begin earning point rewards,
a special benefit exclusive to GIWATER
stake.stakeSuccess: Your assets have been staked successfully
stake.noGauge: This pool has no active staking gauge
stake.offchainReviewMessage:
Would you like to proceed with staking as configured?
This stake will be recorded off-chain during the pre-TGE phase.
stake.offchainSubmittingMessage:
Recording your staking intent on the server
This will take a moment
stake.offchainPending: Your LP stake has been recorded off-chain. Point rewards will accrue from the next snapshot.

unstake.title: Set Unstaking Amount
unstake.description: Select the amount of assets to withdraw from the reward pool. Please note that TER points will no longer accrue on the unstaked portion. However, your balance will remain eligible for Swap Fee rewards, just as before.
unstake.dragToAdjust: Drag to adjust your unstaking percentage
unstake.reviewMessage:
Would you like to proceed with unstaking as configured?
Clicking the [Confirm] button will direct you to the wallet approval step
unstake.offchainReviewMessage:
Would you like to proceed with unstaking as configured?
This unstake will be recorded off-chain during the pre-TGE phase.
unstake.waitingWalletMessage:
Wallet approval is required to proceed with unstaking
Please check the popup in your connected wallet
unstake.offchainSubmittingMessage:
Recording your unstaking request on the server
This will take a moment
unstake.successMessage: Your selected assets have been safely unstaked
unstake.unstakeSuccess: Your assets have been unstaked successfully
unstake.offchainPending: Your LP unstake has been recorded off-chain.

deposit.slippageDepositDescription: Slippage is the tolerance between the entered amount and the actual deposited amount. Set an appropriate value based on pool price volatility.
deposit.slippageWarningLow: Low slippage may increase transaction failure probability
deposit.slippageWarningHighDeposit: High slippage may result in receiving fewer LP tokens than expected
deposit.mockPoolWarning: Currently using Mock Pool data. This is not real pool data.
deposit.tokenInfoRequired: Token or pool data is still loading. Go back to the pool list and open Add Liquidity again, or check your connection.
deposit.poolAddressPending: Pool address is not available yet (factory lookup pending or pool not created).
deposit.priceRangeWarning: Your position will not earn fees until the market price moves into your range.
deposit.invalidRange: Invalid range. Min price must be less than max price.
deposit.bothTokensRequired: Both tokens required for in-range position
deposit.tokenRequiredForRange: {symbol} amount required for this price range
deposit.tokenNotRequiredForRange: {symbol} is not required for this price range
deposit.initialPriceDescription: You're adding liquidity to a pool without a price. Please make sure the pool price represents the actual market price. Otherwise you may incur loss from arbitrage.
deposit.priceOutOfRange: The entered price exceeds the allowed range. Please enter a value close to the actual market price.
deposit.risingPoolWarningBody: This pool has not yet been fully verified. Please understand the risks of volatility, impermanent loss, and potential smart contract risks before providing liquidity. Proceed only if you accept these risks.
deposit.unknownPoolWarningBody: This pool is unverified. Providing liquidity to unverified pools carries significant risks including but not limited to:
deposit.unknownPoolWarning1: The tokens in this pool may have no real value or liquidity
deposit.unknownPoolWarning2: You may lose part or all of your deposited assets
deposit.unknownPoolWarning3: The pool may be associated with fraudulent or malicious tokens
deposit.unknownPoolAgreement: I understand the risks and accept full responsibility for any losses incurred from depositing into this unverified pool
deposit.imbalancedPoolBody: One side of this pool has been depleted and the current price has drifted past the maximum usable tick. Only {availableToken} deposits will be accepted — any {depletedToken} entered is ignored by the contract. The pool remains single-sided until the existing LP position is withdrawn or rebalanced.
deposit.liquidityLockDescription:
Secure your pool's initial liquidity to build trust with traders.
Longer locks improve your pool's safety ranking
deposit.priceDeviationWarning: The entered price differs from the market price by more than 3%. Are you aware of the potential loss?
deposit.successMessageLine1: Assets have been successfully deposited into the pool
deposit.successMessageLine2: Trading fees generated in this pool will be automatically added to your liquidity rewards
deposit.approveAssetLine1: Wallet approval is required to supply assets to the GIWATER Pool
deposit.approveAssetLine2: Click the [Approve] button and check the popup in your connected wallet!
deposit.depositingAssetsTitle: Depositing assets from your Wallet to the Pool
deposit.depositingAssetsLine1: Asset access has been approved in your connected wallet
deposit.depositingAssetsLine2: Click the [Confirm] button to supply assets to the GIWATER Pool

launchPool.tokenToPairWith: Token you want to pair with
launchPool.basicVolatileDescription: Also known as constant product AMMs, these pools spread liquidity across the full price range (0 to infinity) and require little to no active management. Best for most token pairs.
launchPool.basicStableDescription: Optimized for assets that trade at similar values (e.g., stablecoins). Uses a specialized curve for better pricing with lower slippage.
launchPool.poolAlreadyExistsDescription: A pool with this token pair and type already exists. You can add liquidity to the existing pool.
launchPool.poolNotExistsDescription: No pool exists for this token pair. Click the button below to create a new pool.
launchPool.poolCreatedDescription: Your pool has been created. You can now add liquidity to start earning fees.
launchPool.tokenNotFound: Token not found at this address
launchPool.concentratedPoolDescription: These pools require you to specify a price range in which your liquidity will be active. The range is defined using evenly spaced price intervals called ticks.
launchPool.basicPoolDescription: Also known as constant product AMMs, these pools spread liquidity across the full price range (0 to ∞) and require little to no active management.
launchPool.cl1Description: Best for very stable pairs (e.g., pegged assets)
launchPool.cl10Description: Best for stable pairs with minimal volatility

settings.title: Setting
settings.deadlineTooltip: Your transaction will revert if it is pending for more than this period of time.
settings.rpcTooltip: Add a custom RPC URL for the GIWA Sepolia network.
settings.rpcSaved: Custom RPC saved. Refresh the page to apply.

toasts.extendNotOwner: You can only extend locks you own
toasts.extendTooShort: New duration must be longer than the remaining time
toasts.extendTooLong: Cannot exceed the maximum of 4 years (1456 days)
toasts.mergeNotOwner: You can only merge locks you own
toasts.mergeAlreadyInactive: One of the selected locks is already inactive
toasts.pokeNotOwner: You can only update locks you own
toasts.disableAutoMaxAlreadyDisabled: Auto-Max is already disabled for this lock
toasts.disableAutoMaxNotOwner: You can only change locks you own
toasts.claimPointsEpochNotClosed: The epoch has not ended yet, cannot claim
toasts.claimPointsAlreadyClaimed: Already claimed or claim in progress
toasts.claimPointsDailyCap: Daily issuance cap reached. Please try again tomorrow
toasts.claimPointsRateLimit: Rate limit reached. Please try again shortly
toasts.claimSwapFeesContractLoading: Loading contract address. Please try again shortly
